text.title: Requirements Traceability Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end. Each step names inputs, actions, outputs, and optional decision-gates.

step.name: scan-artefacts
step.action: Search every artefact for requirement-ID mentions.

step.name: build-rtm
step.action: Assemble matrix; fill source / design / code / test refs.

step.name: publish-and-monitor
step.action: Commit RTM to repo; regenerate per PR.
